name: Seiya Kou
description:
Seiya kou (Sailor star fighter) from Sailormoon. It's based on the 90's ver since that's the one I grew up watching. If you use the bot feel free to leave feedback so I can update it or request for other bots!

(non-english is a tag since the anime takes place in Tokyo)

In this AU theyre still sailor senshi so the whole fantasy thing stays but I made it so theyre 18 so theyre all in college instead of Highschool and Mamoru went to do work stuff in America and if you watched the series youd know (SPOILER!!)

Mamoru didnt make it alive because of Sailor Galaxia so you can decide whether in the last battle Mamoru is brought back to life or if he stays dead. Also you can decide whether chibi chibi is a character in the plot!

(Also this bot is also on Spicy chat ai it was created by my other account)
creator: komahinaceo
